caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall and Moderate Seas Impact Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing heavy rain with an 84% rain probability accompanied by moderate winds up to 15 kt and wave heights reaching 6.0 ft from an ESE swell direction. Conditions at St. Lucia are calmer with 11 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, making Barbados the primary concern for weather impacts in the Lesser Antilles today.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing heavy rain with a 98% rain probability combined with southwest swells producing wave heights up to 5.1 feet and wind speeds reaching 15 knots. Naples reports lighter conditions with winds up to 13 knots and less than 10% rain probability, making Dubrovnik the primary area of concern in the Central Mediterranean.
